---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new bridge, tool, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What would you like to add or change ?**
A clear description of the feature.

**Which category does this fall into ?**
- [ ] New bridge (which tool : _______________)
- [ ] New tool in an existing bridge
- [ ] PTL / pedagogical improvement
- [ ] Performance or reliability improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

**Describe the use case**
What problem does this solve ? Who would benefit ?

**Example interaction**
If relevant, show what the LLM instruction would look like :

```
User : "..."
Claude calls : bridge_tool_name
Result : ...
```

**Are you willing to contribute this feature ?**
- [ ] Yes, I can submit a pull request
- [ ] I can help test it
- [ ] I am just suggesting it
